title: Jaltomata confinis
intro: Jaltomata confinis is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, known for its medicinal properties and edible fruits. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, infections, and other health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Jaltomata confinis include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is often used in traditional medicine and is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbalists also utilizing its leaves and roots to make salves and creams for topical application.
taxonomy: Jaltomata confinis is classified within the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade family.
